From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1970 studio album by Sonny Phillips

| Sure 'Nuff | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Studio album](/wiki/Album "Album") by [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") | |
| Released | 1970 |
| Recorded | October 20, 1969 |
| Studio | [Van Gelder Studio](/wiki/Van_Gelder_Studio "Van Gelder Studio"), Englewood Cliffs, New Jersey |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| Length | 35:35 |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") PR 7737 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | [Bob Porter](/wiki/Bob_Porter_(record_producer) "Bob Porter (record producer)") |
| [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | |  | ***Sure 'Nuff*** (1970) | *[Black Magic](/w/index.php?title=Black_Magic_(Sonny_Phillips_album)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Black Magic (Sonny Phillips album) (page does not exist)")* (1970) | | |

***Sure 'Nuff*** is the debut album by jazz organist [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") which was recorded in 1969 and released on the [Prestige](/wiki/Prestige_Records "Prestige Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sure_%27Nuff&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarStarStar[[2]](#cite_note-Allmusic-2) |

[Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") awarded the album 4 stars stating "*Sure 'Nuff* isn't an undiscovered masterpiece or anything, but it's considerably more interesting than the average soul-jazz album from the late '60s".[[2]](#cite_note-Allmusic-2)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sure_%27Nuff&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

All compositions by Sonny Phillips except as noted

1. "Sure 'Nuff, Sure 'Nuff" - 6:50
2. "Be Yourself" - 4:30
3. "[Oleo](/wiki/Oleo_(song) "Oleo (song)")" ([Sonny Rollins](/wiki/Sonny_Rollins "Sonny Rollins")) - 7:40
4. "Mobile to Chicago" - 7:25
5. "The Other Blues" - 9:10

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Sure_%27Nuff&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") - [organ](/wiki/Hammond_organ "Hammond organ")
* Virgil Jones - [trumpet](/wiki/Trumpet "Trumpet") (tracks 1, 2 & 4)
* [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") - [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone")
* [Boogaloo Joe Jones](/wiki/Ivan_%22Boogaloo_Joe%22_Jones "Ivan \"Boogaloo Joe\" Jones") - [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* [Bob Bushnell](/wiki/Bob_Bushnell_(musician) "Bob Bushnell (musician)") - [electric bass](/wiki/Electric_bass "Electric bass")
* [Bernard Purdie](/wiki/Bernard_Purdie "Bernard Purdie") - [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
